name: PowerShell DownloadFile
notes:
This rule detects the execution of powershell, a WebClient object creation and the invocation of DownloadFile in a single command line

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth
SIGMA Title: PowerShell DownloadFile
SIGMA Description: Detects the execution of powershell, a WebClient object creation and the invocation of DownloadFile in a single command line


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success, Exploit.Command Execution
when the event matches Command (custom) contains all of [.DownloadFile or System.Net.WebClient]
TD_list: APPLY PowerShell DownloadFile on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success, Exploit.Command Execution
AND when the event matches Command (custom) contains all of [.DownloadFile or System.Net.WebClient]
RED_list: Event description: Detects the execution of powershell, a WebClient object creation and the invocation of DownloadFile in a single command line
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
